default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss how AI can be leveraged to enhance lifecycle marketing and product-led growth efforts at Homebase.](https://fathom.video/share/igQiW4VskemW4tyoMqF719d74zDfYFRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Alvin is focused on delivering the right message to the right user at the right time to drive more value for Homebase customers](https://fathom.video/share/igQiW4VskemW4tyoMqF719d74zDfYFRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Marcel demonstrated how AI can generate contextual content and analyze user mindsets/journeys to create authentic touchpoints](https://fathom.video/share/igQiW4VskemW4tyoMqF719d74zDfYFRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [They discussed potential workflows to incorporate business data, user behavior, and AI-assistance for campaign creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/igQiW4VskemW4tyoMqF719d74zDfYFRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Marcel recommended his upcoming AI workshop to learn prompt engineering principles and build initial AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/igQiW4VskemW4tyoMqF719d74zDfYFRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)

## Topics

### Alvin's Goals and Current Approach

  - [Lead lifecycle marketing efforts to drive more customer value realization](https://fathom.video/share/igQiW4VskemW4tyoMqF719d74zDfYFRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Currently using heuristic-based hypotheses to influence desired user behaviors](https://fathom.video/share/igQiW4VskemW4tyoMqF719d74zDfYFRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Seeking ways to expedite learning and leverage AI to guide decision-making](https://fathom.video/share/igQiW4VskemW4tyoMqF719d74zDfYFRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### AI for Contextual Content Generation

  - [Marcel demoed using AI to analyze context (user info, company info, search results) and generate insightful content](https://fathom.video/share/igQiW4VskemW4tyoMqF719d74zDfYFRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Showed how AI can infer user mindsets, emotional states, and connect to business offerings](https://fathom.video/share/igQiW4VskemW4tyoMqF719d74zDfYFRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Enables creating authentic, personalized messaging and touchpoints](https://fathom.video/share/igQiW4VskemW4tyoMqF719d74zDfYFRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)

### Incorporating Business Data and User Behavior

  - [Discussed incorporating Homebase's business data and user behavior data as inputs](https://fathom.video/share/igQiW4VskemW4tyoMqF719d74zDfYFRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Goal is to build AI-assisted workflows to analyze data and recommend "next best actions" to drive monetization](https://fathom.video/share/igQiW4VskemW4tyoMqF719d74zDfYFRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Example: Identifying top user actions to build audiences and campaigns around](https://fathom.video/share/igQiW4VskemW4tyoMqF719d74zDfYFRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)

### Enablement and Next Steps

  - [Marcel recommended his upcoming AI workshop to learn prompt engineering principles](https://fathom.video/share/igQiW4VskemW4tyoMqF719d74zDfYFRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Hands-on practice building initial AI workflows tailored to Homebase's use cases](https://fathom.video/share/igQiW4VskemW4tyoMqF719d74zDfYFRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Potential for ongoing support to continue building and optimizing AI capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/igQiW4VskemW4tyoMqF719d74zDfYFRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
